query: SELECT s.id, s.fullName, s.grade, s.score FROM students s WHERE s.fullName LIKE '%أحمد سلطان%' ORDER BY s.score DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35xPkBa73Yuiy4A.root --database kcQuJzmxhkjxjyE5pHTEwG --execute SELECT s.id, s.fullName, s.grade, s.score FROM students s WHERE s.fullName LIKE '%أحمد سلطان%' ORDER BY s.score DESC;
